value.text_block: AI coding is the next abstraction layer. We keep moving up in abstraction. Productivity rises each step. Vibe coding is the newest step and it is probably here to stay.

citations.content: AI coding is the next abstraction layer. We keep moving up in abstraction. Productivity rises each step. Vibe coding is the newest step and it is probably here to stay.

citations.content: AI impact is substantial in software development

value.text_block: All code from the fastest growing repos on GitHub is written by AI. OpenClaw went from zero to 200K stars in two months. Built by one guy and Claude Code.

citations.content: All code from the fastest growing repos on GitHub is written by AI. OpenClaw went from zero to 200K stars in two months. Built by one guy and Claude Code.

slide_title.value: Agentic AI coding: from code to steering work

citations.content: Agentic AI coding: from code to steering work

value.text_block:
AI coding can help you ship simple web apps, but the impact is much deeper:
Writes code and runs it: agentic coding tools do not just suggest code, they can execute commands on your laptop or a server, iterate on errors, and ship changes end to end
Agents built on top: OpenClaw can use Claude Code CLI
New bottleneck: with code cheap, trust and security become the constraint

citations.content:
AI coding can help you ship simple web apps, but the impact is much deeper:
Writes code and runs it: agentic coding tools do not just suggest code, they can execute commands on your laptop or a server, iterate on errors, and ship changes end to end
Agents built on top: OpenClaw can use Claude Code CLI
New bottleneck: with code cheap, trust and security become the constraint

question_text.value: Which skills will matter most for builders?

citations.content: Which skills will matter most for builders?

value.text_block:
Coding is one of the first fields to be automated because it is highly logical and verifiable, and developers are building tools to automate their own work.
The same shift will hit any cognitive work soon.

citations.content:
Coding is one of the first fields to be automated because it is highly logical and verifiable, and developers are building tools to automate their own work.
The same shift will hit any cognitive work soon.
